creator: pechter@lakewood.com
text:
The ch driver does not utilize bounce buffers needed for use on ISA/VESA Local
Bus systems with over 16MB of memory.

Fix: 

lousy work around -- removed second 16mb simm
How-To-Repeat: 
put more than 16mb of memory in machine and attempt to access ch driver
with chio -- access to the ch device fails with DMA past ISA.
